---
title: "Silver City, New Mexico"
year: 1
image: /images/silver_city_NM.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Silver City, New Mexico"
categories: ["Integrated Solid Waste Planning"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

# Solid Waste System Analysis

Mr. Bell documented the disadvantages and inefficiencies of the Town's
labor-intensive refuse collection program. A transition to a fully automated
approach for picking up both residential and commercial trash was recommended
with standardized containers provided to residences and businesses.

# Program Implementation

Mr. Bell assisted with the implementation of the plan including equipment
purchases, route audits, equipment distribution, and community outreach.  

[Thumbnail Image by Matthew.kowal - Own work, CC BY-SA 4.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=106154319)
:::
